topic: Why your body kills cancer cells every day (and when it fails)
caption: Did you know your body has a natural cancer-fighting mechanism? 🌟 It's true! Your immune system kills cancer cells daily. 💪 But sometimes, it fails. 🤕 Let's explore why and how to support it. 🌱 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💕 #cancerawareness #immunesystem #healthyliving #cancerprevention #wellness #medicalfacts #healthrecode #sciencebacked
